changeSet.author: ogc-285
changeSet.comment: Add label_preset.is_universal (FR-014a) — per-sample presets that always emit a column

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.label_preset DROP CONSTRAINT label_preset_universal_per_sample;

changeSet.author: ogc-285
changeSet.comment: FR-014a: mark the seeded Specimen Label system preset universal — every sample gets a specimen label; tests only override qty
